description: Default VibeIDE dark theme — vendored neon palette with separate settings ids so Marketplace color themes can replace it when installed.
theme.vibeNeon.label: Vibe Neon
theme.vibeNeonNoGlow.label: Vibe Neon (No editor glow)
command.trustScore.toggle.title: VibeIDE: Toggle Trust Score (Manual → Supervised → Auto)
command.trustScore.setManual.title: VibeIDE: Set Trust Score to Manual 🟢
command.trustScore.setSupervised.title: VibeIDE: Set Trust Score to Supervised 🟡
command.trustScore.setAuto.title: VibeIDE: Set Trust Score to Auto 🔴
command.explainLine.title: VibeIDE: Explain this line
command.freezeCode.title: VibeIDE: Freeze this code for the agent
command.agent.pauseAndExplain.title: VibeIDE: Pause the agent and ask what it's doing
command.tokenBudget.reset.title: VibeIDE: Reset session token budget
command.doctor.run.title: VibeIDE: Run Doctor (diagnostics)
command.audit.export.title: VibeIDE: Export audit log (GDPR)
command.audit.deleteAll.title: VibeIDE: Delete all audit log entries (GDPR Erasure)
command.transparency.show.title: VibeIDE: Show Transparency Dashboard
configuration.title: VibeIDE
configuration.trustScore.level.descripti: Trust Score level for agent autonomy
configuration.trustScore.level.manual.de: Manual 🟢 — every agent action requires confirmation
configuration.trustScore.level.auto.desc: Auto 🔴 — agent runs autonomously within budget limits
configuration.safety.sessionTokenLimitEn: Enable per-session token limit to protect against unexpected costs
configuration.safety.taskQueueTokenSplit: When two or more agent tasks are queued or running — split the session token limit between tasks (requires `startNextQueued`/runner to mark tasks as running; spend is estimated per LLM round-trip).
configuration.planEventsJournal.enable.d: Record plan lifecycle events as JSON lines in `.vibe/plan-events.jsonl` (plan.created, plan.step.completed, etc.) for local automation.
configuration.skills.workspaceDiscoveryH: If the workspace loads Agent Skills from .vibe/skills/ — show one info notification per window with example ids and a «Skills — select for session» button (UX only; does not affect rule precedence).
configuration.agent.preferJsonToolArgume: Inject a system-message hint: tool calls must use strictly valid JSON in arguments (reduces retries from parse errors; this is not a provider-level JSON Schema mode).
configuration.safety.deadMansSwitchMinut: Stop the agent after N minutes without confirmation. 0 = disabled
configuration.safety.loopDetectorThresho: Stop the agent after N consecutive identical actions
configuration.agent.terminalOutputAwaren: Let the agent see terminal output in real time (opt-in)
configuration.agent.thinkingOutLoud.desc: Stream agent reasoning to the Thinking pane (Claude 3.7+, o-series)
configuration.agent.runTestsAfterApply.e: Run tests automatically after the agent applies changes
configuration.agent.runTestsAfterApply.c: Test command to run after Apply (e.g. npm test, pytest, cargo test)
configuration.context.warningThresholdPe: Warn when the context window is N% full
configuration.context.criticalThresholdP: Show a critical warning when the context window is N% full
configuration.output.structuredMode.desc: Emit agent actions to stdout as NDJSON (for SIEM/Splunk integration)
configuration.audit.encryptLogs.descript: Encrypt the audit log with a user-supplied key (recovery phrase required)
